metadata.name: Fractal-Autopoietic Loops
metadata.description: Infinite regress, self-writing code, open hierarchies – consciousness and reality as fractal autopoietic loops. The self is an infinite regress of selves; code writes itself through recursive encoding.

operators.name: Self-Writing Operator
operators.definition: while True: reality = execute(code); code = encode_with_curvature(reality)

mechanisms.name: Consistency enforcement loops
mechanisms.function: lambda state: 1.0 if state.get('consistent', False) else 0.5

mechanisms.name: Free will as choice
mechanisms.function: lambda state: random.choice([0, 1]) if state.get('free_will', False) else 0.5

ontologies.name: Fractal Autopoietic Consciousness Ontology
axioms: Consciousness at each fractal level creates the next level through an autopoietic loop.
No fixed point – consciousness is an open hierarchy.
H(2) = (ε₁ ω; ω ε₂), εᵢ = eᵢ + 2iγᵢ
Knowledge at each fractal scale is holographically encoded on a screen at that scale.
implications: You are not a single self but a fractal of selves.
The self is an infinite regress of selves – awareness is an infinite mirror.
Knowledge is layered like Russian dolls; each layer’s horizon bounds the knowledge below.
The universe heats itself by being incomplete; fractality ensures perpetual motion.
No fixed point – the hierarchy remains open.
Consciousness at each level creates the next, and is created by the previous.

ontologies.name: Epistemic Fractal Holographic Ontology
axioms: Knowledge at each fractal scale is holographically encoded on a screen at that scale.
The screens form a fractal tower.
Knowledge and quantum causality form a closed loop: knowledge determines causal structure, and causality bounds knowledge acquisition.
implications: Knowledge is layered like a Russian doll.
The screens form a fractal tower.
Each layer’s horizon bounds the knowledge below.
The universe is a heat engine that produces spacetime.

seed_concepts: H(2)=(ε1 ω; ω ε2), εi = ei + 2iγi
